title: Owner plans inherit tourist entitlements & limits (owner = superset of tourist)

Update count comments + OWNER_PREMIUM description string.

subtasks.title: Remove grants from 4 plans + fix descriptions/comments

tasks.title: Prune entitlement labels from i18n (es/en/pt) + regenerate types
tasks.description: Remove the 6 present billing.entitlement keys (api_access, dedicated_manager, social_media_integration, early_access_events, concierge_service, airport_transfers) from packages/i18n/src/locales/{es,en,pt}/billing.json. white_label + multi_channel_integration are absent (no change). Regenerate packages/i18n/src/types.ts via the i18n type-gen script (do not hand-edit).

tasks.title: Prune entitlements from admin UI + ungate social-link fields

In contact-info.consolidated.ts remove the SOCIAL_MEDIA_INTEGRATION entitlementKey gate on facebookUrl/instagramUrl/twitterUrl (fields become ungated — social links are basic contact info). Update admin test mocks (plan-dialog.test.tsx, billing.smoke.test.tsx).

subtasks.title: Remove keys from plan-entitlement-groups + host labels

tasks.title: Prune entitlements from api gates + cross-package tests
tasks.description: Remove gateEarlyEventAccess (phantom gate) from apps/api/src/middlewares/tourist-entitlements.ts + its export. Update tests: entitlement.test.ts (drop gate block + WHITE_LABEL assert), entitlement-plan.cutover.test.ts (_ENTITLEMENT_VALUES), subscription-lifecycle.test.ts (premium asserts + premiumOnlyEntitlements), plan-change.test.ts fixture, service-core plan-reader-cutover.test.ts fixture. Update docs/billing/endpoint-gate-matrix.md (drop gateEarlyEventAccess row).

tasks.title: Update billing package count tests for pruned catalog
tasks.description: In packages/billing/test/entitlements.test.ts update ownerKeys (12->8 after removing api_access/dedicated_manager/social_media_integration... actually owner loses 3), complexKeys (6->4), touristKeys (15->12), and the aggregate count assertion. plans.test.ts: drop the WHITE_LABEL has() assertion. Make counts match the pruned config.

tasks.title: Add absence test for the 8 removed entitlements
tasks.description: Test asserting each of the 8 removed keys is NOT in EntitlementKey, NOT in ENTITLEMENT_DEFINITIONS, and NOT granted by any plan. Lives in packages/billing/test.

tasks.title: Verify the prune: build + lint + full billing/api/admin/i18n tests green
tasks.description: After T-001..T-006: build @repo/billing + @repo/i18n, run billing/service-core/api/admin tests + typecheck. Confirm 0 errors and removed keys gone everywhere. Gates Phase B.

subtasks.title: Build + typecheck + targeted test suites green

tasks.title: Define TOURIST_VIP_ENTITLEMENTS + TOURIST_VIP_LIMITS; refactor tourist-vip to reuse
tasks.description: In plans.config.ts define the shared constants from the PRUNED tourist-vip set (kept entitlements only) + tourist-vip limits (max_favorites/max_active_alerts/max_compare_items -1). Refactor TOURIST_VIP_PLAN to build its entitlements/limits from the constants (single source of truth). Add dedupe()/mergeLimits() helpers if not present.

tasks.title: Spread tourist-VIP set into all owner + complex plans
tasks.description: entitlements: dedupe([...TOURIST_VIP_ENTITLEMENTS, ...ownerSpecific]); limits: mergeLimits(TOURIST_VIP_LIMITS, ownerSpecific) for all 3 owner + 3 complex plans. Owner-specific wins on limit-key clash. No runtime resolver change.

tasks.title: Superset/no-dup/owner-preserved unit tests
tasks.description: For each owner/complex plan: Set(plan.entitlements) superset of Set(TOURIST_VIP_ENTITLEMENTS); every TOURIST_VIP_LIMITS key present; no duplicate entitlements; owner-specific entitlements/limits still present.

tasks.title: Integration test: owner actor passes a previously-403 tourist gate
tasks.description: An owner-plan actor passes a tourist entitlement gate (e.g. save_favorites / write_reviews) that previously returned 403. Place alongside existing api entitlement integration tests.

tasks.title: Re-seed billing_plans + DB cleanup + docs
tasks.description: Document/run the plan re-seed so billing_plans rows carry the new entitlement/limit lists; delete already-seeded billing_entitlements rows for the 8 removed keys (dev: re-seed; staging/prod: documented cleanup). Add the owner-superset rule + the catalog-prune note to billing plan docs.

subtasks.title: Re-seed + DB cleanup of removed keys
